title: Substance dispensing handle and container assemblies, substance dispensing handles, and personal care devices
abstract: A personal care device includes a handle including a head supporting a personal care implement, a cradle longitudinally extending from the head to a proximal extremity open to the cradle, an elongate opening open to the cradle and extending longitudinally between the head and the proximal extremity and defined by mutually respective longitudinal edges, and a container extending longitudinally through the cradle. The container is deformable and a longitudinal part of the container extends laterally outward from the cradle through the elongate opening beyond the longitudinal edges. The container includes a dispensing opening proximate to the proximal extremity that is normally closed by a closure. In another embodiment, the container is coupled in fluid communication to the personal care implement.
claims:
Claims 27 CLAIMS 1. A handle and container assembly, comprising: a handle comprising a head, a cradle longitudinally extending from the head to a proximal extremity open to the cradle and an elongate opening open to the cradle and extending longitudinally between the head and the proximal extremity and defined by mutually respective longitudinal edges; and a container longitudinally extending through the cradle from proximate to the head to a dispensing opening proximate to the proximal extremity and normally closed by a closure, the container is deformable and a longitudinal part of the container extends laterally outward from the cradle through the elongate opening beyond the longitudinal edges. 2. The handle and container assembly according to claim 1, wherein the container is resiliently deformable enabling the container to spring back, rebound, or otherwise return to an original form, an un-squeezed or un-collapsed form, after being deformed or collapsed by being squeezed, the elongate opening has a length from the head to the proximal extremity, and the longitudinally part of the container extends longitudinally through the length of the elongate opening from the head to the proximal extremity. 3. The handle and container assembly according to claim 1, wherein: the closure is movable from a first position, wherein the dispensing opening normally closed, to a second position, wherein the dispensing opening is open; and the closure extends longitudinally outwardly from the proximal extremity to enable movement of the closure between the first position and the second position without interference from the handle. 4. The handle and container assembly according to claim 1, wherein the container is received slidably in the cradle through the proximal extremity. 5. The handle and container assembly according to claim 4, further comprising a retention assembly releasably retaining the container to the cradle 

comprising retention elements of the container received slidably by corresponding complemental retention elements of the cradle, wherein each said retention element comprises one of a rib and a groove and each said complement retention element comprises the other of the rib and the groove. 6. The handle and container assembly according to claim 5, wherein the ribs and the grooves concurrently extend longitudinally in a direction from the head to the proximal extremity. 7. The handle and container assembly according to claim 1, wherein an outer end of the container opposite to the dispensing opening is juxtaposed with the head, and the longitudinal part extends between the outer end of the container and the proximal extremity. 8. The handle and container assembly according to claim 7, wherein the outer end of the container is in direct contact against the head. 9. The handle and container assembly according to claim 1, further comprising a personal care implement carried by the head. 10. The handle and container assembly according to claim 9, wherein the personal care implement is connected releasably to the head. 11. The handle and container assembly according to claim 1, wherein the head includes an inlet in fluid communication with the container and an outlet in fluid communication with the inlet. 12. The handle and container assembly according to claim 11, wherein the inlet comprises a nipple extending into the container from the head. 13. The handle and container assembly according to claim 11, further comprising: a personal care implement carried by the head; and 

 the outlet is open to the personal care implement. 14. The handle and container assembly according to claim 13, wherein the personal care implement is connected releasably to the head by an engagement element of the head connected releasably to a complemental engagement element of the personal care implement, and the outlet is open to the personal care implement from the engagement element. 15. A handle and container assembly, comprising: a handle comprising a head, a cradle longitudinally extending from the head to a proximal extremity open to the cradle and an elongate opening open to the cradle and extending longitudinally between the head and the proximal extremity and defined by mutually respective longitudinal edges; a container longitudinally extending through the cradle, the container is deformable and a longitudinal part of the container extends laterally outward from the cradle through the elongate opening beyond the longitudinal edges; and the head includes an inlet in fluid communication with the container and an outlet in fluid communication with the inlet. 16. The handle and container assembly according to claim 15, wherein the container is resiliently deformable enabling the container to spring back, rebound, or otherwise return to an original form, an un-squeezed or un-collapsed form, after being deformed or collapsed by being squeezed. 17. The handle and container assembly according to claim 15, wherein the inlet comprises a nipple extending into the container from the head. 18. The handle and container assembly according to claim 17, wherein the container includes an outer end in direct contact against the head, the nipple extends into the container through the outer end, and the longitudinal part extends between the outer end of the container and the proximal extremity. 19. The handle and container assembly according to claim 15, wherein the container additionally includes a dispensing opening proximate to the proximal extremity and normally closed by a closure. 20. The handle and container assembly according to claim 15, wherein the container is received slidably in the cradle through the proximal extremity. 21. The handle and container assembly according to claim 20, further comprising a retention assembly releasably retaining the container to the cradle comprising retention elements of the container received slidably by corresponding complemental retention elements of the cradle, wherein each said retention element comprises one of a rib and a groove and each said complement retention element comprises the other of the rib and the groove. 22. The handle and container assembly according to claim 21, wherein the ribs and the grooves concurrently extend longitudinally in a direction from the head to the proximal extremity. 23. The handle and container assembly according to claim 15, further comprising: a personal care implement carried by the head; and the outlet is open to the personal care implement. 24. The handle and container assembly according to claim 23, wherein the personal care implement is connected releasably to the head by an engagement element of the head connected releasably to a complemental engagement element of the personal care implement, and the outlet is open to the personal care implement from the engagement element. 25. A personal care device, comprising: a handle comprising a head supporting a personal care implement, a cradle extending longitudinally from the head to the proximal extremity open to the cradle, and an elongate opening open to the cradle and extending longitudinally between the 

 31 head and the proximal extremity and defined by mutually respective longitudinal edges; and a container in fluid communication with the personal care implement and longitudinally extending through the cradle, the container is deformable and a longitudinal part of the container extends laterally outward from the cradle through the elongate opening beyond the longitudinal edges. 26. The personal care device according to claim 25, wherein the container is resiliently deformable enabling the container to spring back, rebound, or otherwise return to an original form, an un-squeezed or un-collapsed form, after being deformed or collapsed by being squeezed. 27. The personal care device according to claim 25, wherein the container additionally includes a dispensing opening proximate to the proximal extremity and normally closed by a closure. 28. The personal care device according to claim 25, wherein the container is received slidably in the cradle through the proximal extremity. 29. A personal care device, comprising: a head supporting a personal care implement; and a handle longitudinally extending from the head to a break-away closure normally closing an outlet to a personal care composition confined in the handle, the break-away closure configured to be broken away from the handle to open the outlet for enabling the personal care composition to be dispensed from the handle through the outlet. 30. The personal care device according to claim 29, wherein the break-away closure is connected frangibly to the handle. 31. The personal care device according to claim 29, wherein the personal care implement is connected releasably to the head. 

 32 32. A handle assembly, comprising: a head configured to connect to a personal care implement; and a handle longitudinally extending from the head to a break-away closure normally closing an outlet to a personal care composition confined in the handle, the break-away closure configured to be broken away from the handle to open the outlet for enabling the personal care composition to be dispensed from the handle through the outlet. 33. The personal care device according to claim 32, wherein the break-away closure is connected frangibly to the handle. 34. The personal care device according to claim 32, wherein the personal care implement is connected releasably to the head. 35. A method, comprising: providing a head supporting a personal care implement, and a handle longitudinally extending from the head to a break-away closure normally closing an outlet to a personal care composition confined in the handle; opening the outlet by breaking the break-away closure away from the handle; and dispensing the personal care composition from the handle through the outlet. 36. A method, comprising: providing a head configured to be connected to a personal care implement, and a handle longitudinally extending from the head to a break-away closure normally closing an outlet to a personal care composition confined in the handle; opening the outlet by breaking the break-away closure away from the handle; and dispensing the personal care composition from the handle through the outlet.
